name: Nemotron 3 Ultra
description: Nemotron 3 Ultra is NVIDIA's largest open base model, a 550B total-parameter hybrid Mamba-Transformer mixture-of-experts model with up to 55B active parameters per token and up to 1M tokens of context. This entry tracks the announced base checkpoint ahead of full release.

details.name: availability
details.value: NVIDIA documents Nemotron 3 Ultra as an announced pre-training base checkpoint and says weights are expected with the full release in 1H 2026.
